parameters.subject: =Interview Invitation - {{$json.name}}
parameters.message:
=

Dear {{$json.name}},

We reviewed your application for the {{$json.role}} position and would like to invite you to the next step of the process.

Your profile was assessed as {{$json.classification}}.

We will follow up with the interview calendar invitation shortly. Please reply if you need to reschedule.

Kind regards,
Trilles AI Hiring Team

parameters.subject: Manual review required - {{$json.name}} ({{$json.role}})
parameters.message:
=

Hello Hiring Team,

A candidate for the {{$json.role}} role has been scored as {{$json.classification}} and should be reviewed manually.

Name: {{$json.name}}
Email: {{$json.email}}
Score: {{$json.score}}

Summary: {{$json.summary}}

Concerns: {{$json.concerns}}

Please review the candidate record in the master sheet.

Regards,
Trilles AI Automation

parameters.subject: Update on your application - {{$json.name}}
parameters.message:
=

Dear {{$json.name}},

Thank you for taking the time to apply for the {{$json.role}} role at Trilles AI.

After reviewing your application, we will not be moving forward at this stage. This decision was based on the current needs of the role and the fit of the submitted materials.

We appreciate your interest and encourage you to apply again for future opportunities.

Kind regards,
Trilles AI Hiring Team
